completed: Tailwind CSS v4 setup with design tokens
Complete directory structure (api, components, pages, hooks, context, utils)
All UI components (Button, Badge, Table, Modal, Toast, Spinner, FileDropzone, Pagination)
All pages (Login, ChangePassword, Admin Dashboard/Departments/Classes/Faculty/Students/BatchView/BatchStudentDetail, HOD Dashboard/Dues/Overrides, Faculty Dashboard/Pending/History, Student Status)
All API stubs (auth, departments, subjects, classes, faculty, students, batch, approvals, hod, studentPortal, import, sse)
pending: Backend API integration (when backend is ready)
Real SSE integration for batch grid
Import file parsing with actual CSV/XLSX library

decisions.decision: Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS-first config
decisions.trade_offs: Newer version with less community resources, but better DX and performance

decisions.decision: Framer Motion for page transitions and modal animations
decisions.trade_offs: Adds ~30KB to bundle but provides smooth, production-grade animations

decisions.decision: Email prefix-based role detection for demo purposes
decisions.trade_offs: Not secure, but enables full role-based UI testing without backend
